META_DESCRIPTION: FastComments Flex pricing: pay only for what you use. Commenting, live chat, SSO, and moderation with no credit card required to start.
DESCRIPTION_PLANS: One plan. Only pay for what you actually use.
DESCRIPTION_BEST_PRICE: No surprises. Launch the calculator to see what Flex costs for your traffic before you sign up.
PRICE_LABEL: Only pay for what you use.
LETS_TALK_DESCRIPTION: Ready to build social features into your app, or add live commenting to a news site? We're ready to jump in your Slack and work with you.
LETS_TALK_DESCRIPTION_3: Are you ready for bots and spammers to hit your endpoints thousands of times a second? Let us handle that.
LETS_TALK_DESCRIPTION_4: Just pick a time from our Calendly, jump on our Discord, or send us an email.
LETS_TALK_STATUS_OFFLINE: Off Hours - Will Reply Next Day
